channel.title: Tommy's Daily Tech Briefing
channel.description: Deep-dive technology news briefing with industry analysis, executive insights, and strategic context.

item.title: Tech Briefing - Wednesday, April 22, 2026
item.description: Meta announces keystroke tracking, Google and Anthropic make big moves, and Adobe joins the AI arms race with surprises all around.

item.title: Tech Briefing - Tuesday, April 21, 2026
item.description: Tim Cook steps down from Apple, handing the reins to John Ternus after fifteen years — plus rapid-fire moves across tech and markets.

item.title: Tech Briefing - Monday, April 20, 2026
item.description: Google pushes custom AI silicon, a major platform breach surfaces, and a shoe company decides it's a data center now.

item.title: Tech Briefing - Sunday, April 19, 2026
item.description: Salesforce rebuilds Slackbot from scratch, IPO stories turn heads, and the AI infrastructure arms race shows no signs of slowing.

item.title: Tech Briefing - Saturday, April 18, 2026
item.description: AI policy drama heats up, a high-profile CEO exits, a quantum computing billionaire appears overnight, and Netflix stumbles hard.

item.title: Tech Briefing - Friday, April 17, 2026
item.description: Google and CoreWeave pour billions into AI infrastructure, major model updates drop, and Apple-Google tensions reach new heights.

item.title: Tech Briefing - Thursday, April 16, 2026
item.description: OpenAI launches a cybersecurity model, chipmakers print record cash, and one of the stranger corporate pivots in recent memory.

item.title: Tech Briefing - Wednesday, April 15, 2026
item.description: AI liability risks emerge as Moody's flags lender exposure, data center arms race intensifies, and the industry's pace defies expectations.
